name: ChromeWheelRouter MVP User Flow
user_goal: Use MX Master horizontal wheel in Chrome for existing Logi Options+ behavior, while Option + horizontal wheel zooms the page.

happy_path.action: Grant required macOS permissions when prompted
Open Google Chrome and use bare horizontal wheel
happy_path.expected: Existing Logi Options+ behavior still works, such as tab switching.

happy_path.action: Hold Option and use horizontal wheel in Chrome
happy_path.expected: Chrome page zooms in or out.

happy_path.action: Switch to Finder or another non-Chrome app and use horizontal wheel

happy_path.expected: All mouse behavior returns to system / Logi Options+ defaults.

must_not_happen: Chrome bare horizontal scroll triggers zoom.
Non-Chrome app receives Chrome zoom shortcut.
The app listens to keyboard events.
The app changes Logi Options+ settings.
